task:
MuseScore 3 is already open with /home/user/Documents/suite.mscz — 6 measures of quarter notes in C major 4/4.

Export the score to all five of these formats at exactly these paths:
- Standard MIDI File: /home/user/Documents/suite.mid
- Uncompressed MusicXML: /home/user/Documents/suite.musicxml
- PDF File: /home/user/Documents/suite.pdf
- PNG Images: /home/user/Documents/suite.png (a single PNG file)
- Wave Audio: /home/user/Documents/suite.wav

The original /home/user/Documents/suite.mscz must still exist. The MIDI must contain at least 4 notes, the MusicXML must have at least 1 part, the PDF must have a valid %PDF- header, the PNG must have a valid PNG header, and the WAV must have a duration of at least 1 second.

verification.description: Exported suite.png exists with PNG header
suite.wav duration is at least 1 second
